source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #27153 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

### What is changed and how it works?

Case `TestIssue23872` use `tk.Exec` and not close it can cause data race. So close it after use.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

- [x] Unit test
